HoverColors.UI.Title: Hover Colors
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Info: Click this to turn tooltips ON/OFF.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Close: Close panel. Default hotkey: J. The game top-left icon also toggles it.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetOutline: OUTLINE: click to reset color and alpha to game defaults.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetFill: FILL: click to reset to 0% (game default).
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.FillOpacity: Fill area opacity inside the outline.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetGuidelines: GUIDELINES: tap to toggle S1/S2 between vanilla and your last custom colors. Dashed color dropdown and opacity slider stay unchanged.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesColor: Large guide circles / spacing lines color + opacity.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesOpacity: Dashed guide line opacity. This city slider is synced with the Options menu slider.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.SurfaceToggle: Hide Surface tool boundary preview fill.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.SpecializedIndust: Hide Extractor Lot area preview fill.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Preset1:
Slot 1 — tap to apply, hold 0.8s to overwrite with your current color.
Hotkey K toggles between slot 1 and slot 2.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Preset2:
Slot 2 — tap to apply, hold 0.8s to overwrite with your current color.
Hotkey K toggles between slot 1 and slot 2.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetPresets:
↺ 1st click: resets both preset slots to mod defaults.
↺ 2nd click: restores your previous colors.
If already at defaults, does nothing.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.DistrictColors:
Click for District overlay fill and boundary line color/opacity.
Hold 0.8s to reset Districts to vanilla.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetDistrictColo: Reset all districts to the game's vanilla blue.
